channel.title: experimentum on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in experimentum on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Experimentum Data Wrangling Demo
item.description: (updated 2021-01-21) Experimentum studies require that you download data from questionnaires and experiments separately, since the data have different formats. You can participate anonymously in the demo study (the median completion time is 3.8 minutes). The links below update dynamically, so your data will be available immediately. questionnaire data experiment data project structure The project structure file above is a JSON-formatted file that contains all of the information needed to run a study in Experimentum.
